calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-11-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2013 Continued To Dec-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Verleana Green for Sabrina Foster and Salina Foster (Administrators).

Ms. Green stated that the Estate was distributed, that she has been attempting to resolve this issue, that she got the Administrators to obtain waivers of account from all of the Beneficiaries, that they have copies of cashier's checks and notarized statements from the Beneficiaries, and that Inheritance Funding also provided releases and satisfactions. Ms. Green also stated that payment to Inheritance Funding came out of each of the Beneficiaries share, that each Beneficiaries share was discounted based on the assignments with Inheritance Funding, that she was provided with a cashier's check for her fees but she has not cashed it and that there will not be any taxes due on this estate. In addition, Ms. Green stated that the Franchise Tax Board ("FTB") has been noticed, and that there is no issue with the Department of Health Services ("DHS") or Victim's Compensation. The Court informed Counsel that a further amendment was needed to include all of the allegations regarding the FTB, DHS and Victim's Compensation. Ms. Green will try to obtain something in writing from the FTB. The accounting petition was continued to December 11, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Whitney. (Not Reported)
